FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-22-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by telephone for Jin Di Guan (Petitioner).

The Court raised the issue of no documentation to support the absence of rent payments, $18,800.00 paid for work done on the property with no bids and questions what work was done. Mr. Bresler stated that he provided a revised accounting in February answering everything, that the $18,800.00 was for maintenance and work done for making the property ready for sale and that the person doing the work was a Friend of the Decedent, not the Petitioner. Mr. Brelser also stated that his Client has one sale completed and that he sent an ex parte petition for exclusive listing to sell the other property. The Amended First Account and Report of Administrator is taken under submission. Mr. Bresler is to file a more detailed declaration as to the work that was done.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
